about.heroSubtitle: We're on a mission to make scrap selling transparent, convenient, and rewarding for every household in India.
about.missionDesc: To eliminate unfair practices in the scrap industry by providing certified digital weighing, transparent pricing, and instant doorstep payments to every household.
about.visionDesc: To become India's most trusted scrap recycling platform, creating a circular economy where every piece of waste finds its way back to productive use.
about.storyDesc: Kabadizone was born in Muzaffarpur, Bihar, from a simple frustration — the lack of transparency in the traditional kabadi system. Households were consistently underpaid, scales were rigged, and recyclable waste ended up in landfills. We set out to change that. Starting with just a digital scale and a smartphone, we built a platform that connects households directly with verified scrap collectors, ensuring fair prices, accurate weighing, and responsible recycling.
about.value_transparencyDesc: Certified digital scales and live market rates — no hidden deductions.
about.value_sustainabilityDesc: Every kg collected goes to authorized recycling plants, not landfills.
about.value_communityDesc: Empowering local scrapboys with fair wages and growth opportunities.
about.value_convenienceDesc: Free doorstep pickup with flexible scheduling and instant payments.
about.ctaSubtitle: Sell your scrap the smart way. Fair prices, zero hassle, and a positive impact on the planet.
